ssrVariant.description: Framer SSR responsive variant containers — hidden by default, shown via CSS media queries

scrollReveal.gsap: gsap.from(el, { y: 50, opacity: 0, scrollTrigger: { trigger: el, start: 'top 85%' } })
scrollReveal.motion: { initial: { opacity: 0, y: 50 }, whileInView: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, viewport: { once: true }, transition: { duration: 0.8 } }

parallax.detection: transform translateY changes at non-1x scroll ratio
parallax.gsap: gsap.to(el, { y: () => scrollY * speed, scrollTrigger: { scrub: true } })

stickySection.detection: position: sticky or pinned section with scroll-linked transforms
stickySection.gsap: ScrollTrigger.create({ trigger: el, pin: true, start: 'top top', end: '+=200%' })

maskReveal.detection: clipPath or borderRadius changes on scroll (circle expanding)

horizontalScroll.detection: translateX changes linked to vertical scroll
horizontalScroll.gsap: gsap.to(strip, { xPercent: -100, scrollTrigger: { trigger: section, scrub: 1, pin: true } })

marquee.detection: infinite translateX animation on repeating text elements, often with rotation matrix

entranceFade.detection: opacity 0→1 with delay on page load (framer-appear-id)
entranceFade.motion: { initial: { opacity: 0 }, animate: { opacity: 1 }, transition: { duration: 0.8, delay: 0.2 } }

3dPerspective.detection: matrix3d transform with perspective on child images
